/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.dir/tests/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.c.o CMakeFiles/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.dir/src/frontend/swsh_frontend_pc34_compat.c.o CMakeFiles/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.dir/src/shared/bitmap_call_pc34_compat.c.o CMakeFiles/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.dir/src/shared/image_expand_pc34_compat.c.o CMakeFiles/test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration.dir/src/shared/image_backend_pc34_compat.c.o -o test_swsh_frontend_pc34_compat_integration
